summary: Chaioz Phase 1 — Iteration 2 e2e verification (both). Backend: 41/41 pytest (20 iter1 regression + 21 new iter2) passed in ~9s total. Iter2 covers: admin image upload (Emergent Object Storage real round-trip + public fetch verified content-type image/png), admin menu CRUD (POST/PUT/DELETE), bestseller per-item imagery (8 distinct Unsplash urls, no generic CDN), cart snapshot (email / phone / empty / no-contact), cart scan count, delivery quote (mock=true, fee_aud=8.99, dropoff_eta set), full delivery order (mock tracking_url + mock-delivery-* id + delivery_status=pending, delivery_fee added to total), pickup regression, order-ready SMS DEV log, admin-stats regression. Backend logs show both '[DEV EMAIL]' (order confirmation) and '[DEV SMS]' (order ready) lines as expected in graceful-mock mode. Frontend: Landing bestsellers render distinct per-item Unsplash images. Community page contains 3 .instagram-media blockquotes. Admin login works; Menu tab CRUD verified end-to-end in UI (create TEST_UI_Masala_E2E → appears → edit dialog prefilled → price update → delete removes tile). Checkout delivery toggle reveals address form; Get Quote returns '$8.99 · update' and shows mock disclaimer.

issues: 401s observed in browser console on initial page load due to /api/auth/me probe when unauthenticated — expected (logged-out state) but noisy. Consider suppressing console.error for 401 on /auth/me fetch in AuthContext.

action_items: (Optional) Silence expected 401 from /auth/me on anonymous page load (AuthContext) to keep console clean.

(Optional) orders.py line 95 formats pickup_time via datetime.fromisoformat only when customer_email is set — but pickup_time='ASAP' would crash that path. Consider defensive try/except around the strftime formatting so confirmation-email task doesn't swallow a ValueError silently when callers pass 'ASAP'. Currently works because ASAP path never has email in tests.
critical_code_review_comments: uploads.py stores record keyed by storage_path only — works; consider also indexing by file_id for O(1) delete later. Deduplicates well via UUID path.

delivery.py webhook verify_webhook_signature returns True when UBER_WEBHOOK_SIGNING_KEY is unset (dev mode). Acceptable for dev, but log a WARNING on each webhook in dev to flag insecure state; ensure prod config always has signing key.

orders.py: delivery dispatch failure silently marks delivery_status='dispatch_failed' without alerting admin. Consider raising a visible flag (e.g., order tag, admin notification) so dispatch failures are surfaced in the admin orders tab.
admin.py create_menu_item does not validate category against the fixed CATEGORIES list used by the frontend; a typo would create orphan items invisible in the category filter. Add a whitelist check.

cart_recovery.py run_recovery_scan sends email + SMS but does not catch per-recipient failures — a single Resend failure would abort the loop mid-scan. Wrap each send in try/except so a bad contact doesn't block others.

notifications.py format_au_phone returns None for 11-digit numbers that aren't '61'-prefixed — good strictness. But SMS trigger in admin.py skips when format returns None; worth logging this so ops can see dropped sends.
services/storage.py init_storage caches _storage_key process-wide; ensure rotation path exists if Emergent rotates keys — minor.
MenuItemEditor.jsx uploads via /uploads/image then stores full CDN URL (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL + /api/uploads/public/...); response payload pattern is consistent. LGTM.

success_rate.frontend: 95% — all verified flows pass; only menu->cart customize confirm not completed in my script (not a product bug, backend E2E covers order creation)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@chaioz.com.au / Chaioz@2026. Users registered dynamically with TEST_ prefix.
seed_data_creation: Tests create & delete TEST_Latte_iter2 menu item (cleaned up). TEST_UI_Masala_E2E created+deleted via UI. A real PNG was uploaded to Emergent Object Storage under chaioz/menu/<uuid>.png (retained; tiny 1x1 pixel).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at https://late-night-chai-1.preview.emergentagent.com/api. Mock mode confirmed for Uber/Resend/Twilio (no keys). Emergent Object Storage IS live. Public image fetch endpoint is /api/uploads/public/<storage_path>. Cart snapshot accepts email OR phone; empty items returns ok:true with reason='empty cart'; scan returns {scanned:true, sent:N}. Delivery quote mock fee is 899 cents (8.99 AUD). Delivery order creates 'mock-delivery-*' id and example.com tracking URL. Order status 'ready' with customer_phone triggers backend [DEV SMS] log line. Admin menu CRUD: POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/menu. Admin UI testids: admin-menu-new, admin-menu-search, edit-<id>, delete-<id>, menu-editor-dialog, menu-name, menu-price, menu-category, menu-save. Checkout testids: fulfillment-pickup/delivery, delivery-address-section, delivery-street/city/zip, get-delivery-quote, checkout-total, checkout-place-order, tracking-link.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found. All iteration-2 features operate correctly including graceful mock paths (Uber/Resend/Twilio). Browser console shows expected 401 from /auth/me while unauthenticated — cosmetic only.
